message:
fix(server): repair replica tests and add reconfigure flag

- Add replica_reconfigure_requested flag to ServerState to signal
  when REPLICAOF/SLAVEOF changes require connection reset
- Update drive_replica_sync to check and clear the reconfigure flag
- Fix 6 failing replica tests by clearing reconfigure flag after
  REPLICAOF calls to test actual sync behavior vs reset behavior
- Fix tcp_multiple_commands_pipelined to use BufferedTcpClient
  with read_responses(2) instead of broken raw TcpStream calls
- Add replicaof_reconfigure_resets_replica_sync_state test
- Process buffered data in sync_replica_with_primary before erroring
  on disconnect to handle data sent before connection close

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
